class.script:
function n5plpozkalcp_as_text() n5plpozkalcp_as_text = "" end function
function n5plpozkalcp_initnew() ' this_.dDataOd = this_.parent.dDataOd ' this_.dDataDo = this_.parent.dDataDo n5plpozkalcp_initnew = true end function
function n5plpozkalcp_checkdatetimerange() n5plpozkalcp_checkdatetimerange = true '_ ' (this_.dDataOd >= this_.parent.dDataOd) and _ ' (this_.dDataDo <= this_.parent.dDataDo) and _ ' (this_.dDataOd <= this_.dDataDo) and _ ' (this_.tCzasOd <= this_.tCzasDo) end function
function n5plpozkalcp_befins() n5plpozkalcp_befins = n5plpozkalcp_checkdatetimerange() if not n5plpozkalcp_befins then trans_.message 0,0, "Nieprawidłowe wartości daty i czasu" exit function end if end function
function n5plpozkalcp_befupd() n5plpozkalcp_befupd = n5plpozkalcp_checkdatetimerange() if not n5plpozkalcp_befupd then trans_.message 0,0, "Nieprawidłowe wartości daty i czasu" exit function end if end function
